name: eval spec schema: accepts each category enum value (react|node|types|foundation|standards|compliance|prompt|space|hardening|security|tdd|operational|execution|pr-corpus|workflow|rule-engine|source-folder)
command: set -e; for c in react node types foundation standards compliance prompt space hardening security tdd operational execution pr-corpus workflow rule-engine source-folder; do echo "{\"name\":\"t\",\"command\":\"echo hi\",\"setup\":[],\"expect\":{\"exit_code\":0},\"category\":\"$c\"}" > spec.json; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-eval-spec.sh" spec.json >/dev/null 2>&1; done; echo ok >&2
